name: Microphone Windows capture
nativeBoundary: WASAPI COM interfaces activated from MMDeviceEnumerator
hardwareTests: enumerate built-in and USB capture endpoints
start shared-mode event capture on default console, multimedia, and communications roles
capture sustained baseline without unbounded memory growth
observe unplug/default change without silently replacing explicit endpoints
stop/dispose endpoint release and no later callbacks
permission denied, busy endpoint, unsupported format, and device invalidation faults
